description_long: This is a stylized, open-top SUV with a boxy, angular design and a rugged appearance, reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles like the Jeep Wrangler. The body is primarily a muted red with beige accents along the sides and fenders, and it features a prominent front bumper and grille. The vehicle has four large, hexagonal wheels with thick, dark tires, and a visible spare tire mounted on the rear. The interior is simple, with two front seats and a rear bench, all in a dark gray color, and the SUV is equipped with a roll cage and three roof-mounted lights. The doors are absent, giving it an open, accessible look, and the windshield is slightly slanted with a solid frame. The overall finish is matte, with hard, polygonal surfaces and minimal detailing, emphasizing a low-poly, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A stylized, open-top red and beige SUV with a roll cage, roof lights, and a rear-mounted spare tire. The design is boxy and rugged, with large hexagonal wheels and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the slanted windshield, front bumper, grille, and roof lights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open cabin, roll cage, and absence of doors, as well as the full profile of the wheels.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the spare tire, rear bumper, and the open back of the SUV.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the interior seating arrangement and the open structure of the vehicle.
attribute_wheel_design: hexagonal, solid dark rims with no visible spokes
